teams.name: Net Profits
notes: Play 2-3 zone — back row sits high, slow rotations
Get paint touch then look backdoor or short corner
If they're hitting 3s, light contest — consider switching to 3-2 or man

players.name: Big
threat: Dominant in the post once he catches and turns — do not let him get position
defend: Deny the entry pass early — push him off his spot before he catches
Pick him up before he turns and gets inside

players.name: Samurai
threat: Makes every open look — must contest every single catch
defend: Do not leave him for help defense
Misses when pressured — get a hand up every time

players.name: Pt Guard shooter
players.profile: Point guard shooter. Wants the shot, will take contested mids.
threat: Can hit the 3 off the dribble
Will take and make mid-range contested shots
defend: He takes bad shots under pressure, keep contesting

teams.name: Team Tam
notes: Good ball movement and good rotation on defense

players.name: Shooter
threat: Best shooter — will pull up for fast break 3s
defend: Get back in transition — no free fast break 3s

players.name: Big dude
players.profile: Good in the post. Also a shooter and playmaker.
threat: Can shoot and create off the dribble
defend: Don't let him catch in the post
Stay attached on the perimeter — he will shoot

players.name: Athletic dude
players.profile: Most athletic player. Good at drives, layups, floaters.
threat: Dangerous off the dribble — finishes with layups and floaters

teams.name: Johns Eight
notes: Mainly good from inside, but will take contested mid range/layups if guarded

players.name: Big guy
threat: Good inside (good at quick push shot/layups) but if you contest will take wild shots
defend: Box out properly. collapse on him if the others cant shoot
Don't take contested shots against him

players.name: Quick guy
threat: Is quick and can drive and layup
defend: Don't be lazy on the contest or close out drive

players.name: Maybe shooter?
defend: Make sure to close out on him on 3

players.name: Spinner
players.profile: Likes to spin in the post.
defend: Beware of the spin and bump
